title: Oracle Autonomous Database
description: Represents an Oracle Autonomous Database instance in Oracle Cloud Infrastructure, including configuration, lifecycle state, connection details, and scaling parameters.

id.description: The OCID (Oracle Cloud Identifier) of the Autonomous Database

compartmentId.description: The OCID of the compartment containing the Autonomous Database

displayName.description: User-friendly display name for the Autonomous Database

dbName.description: The database name, unique within the tenancy

dbWorkload.description: The workload type of the Autonomous Database

isAutoScalingEnabled.description: Whether auto-scaling is enabled for CPU resources

isAutoScalingForStorageEnabled.description: Whether auto-scaling is enabled for storage

isDedicated.description: Whether the database runs on dedicated Exadata infrastructure

isFreeTier.description: Whether this is an Always Free Autonomous Database

lifecycleState.description: Current lifecycle state of the Autonomous Database

licenseModel.description: The Oracle license model for the Autonomous Database

connectionStrings.description: Connection strings for different service levels

high.description: High-priority connection string with highest parallelism

medium.description: Medium-priority connection string with moderate parallelism

low.description: Low-priority connection string for batch operations

connectionUrls.description: URLs for database tools and services

machineLearningUserManagementUrl.description: URL for Machine Learning user management

ordsUrl.description: URL for Oracle REST Data Services

whitelistedIps.description: List of allowed IP addresses or CIDR blocks for access control

subnetId.description: The OCID of the subnet for private endpoint access

timeCreated.description: Timestamp when the database was created

timeMaintenanceBegin.description: Start time of next scheduled maintenance window

timeMaintenanceEnd.description: End time of next scheduled maintenance window
